review_text: What a fantastic spot, we had views over the lake. A nice big pet friendly site. The amenities are kept clean, shops etc are located close by. A seafood truck drives through the park Friday’s and Saturday’s and the season is excellent.
Cabin riddled with mould, dated and filthy. Photos say it all.

Great place to go relax and have fun with family and friends..
It has hot shower.. a pool.. playground for the little ones and everything else you’d expect from a holiday park..
With a great lake view and situated near the beach..  it was a great stage for the long weekend

Fantastic meal.
Competitive pricing. Service great.

Stayed here with grandchildren and was expected some kids activities but just has basic s. Jumping  Pillow and Swimming pool.  No kids reading books and lounge.  Seems  to have only one dump point  compare to its park size. Quiet and easy access to the lake which was good!.

It's a quiet and small campsite compared with the nearby nrma sites. We stayed at a powered site for 2 nights . The powered site area is smaller compared with the one in Umina. Our car had to park very close to our neighbor caravan. Luckily our neighbor campers were well behaved esp at night.
There is only a small swimming pool , a small playground and a jumping pillow for the kids. You can hire a gocart for $20/hr. Toilets are clean, camp kitchen facilities are basic. We did not cook as there are restaurants and eaterys around the corner.

Bring your pets, your paddle board and kayak, your bike. And you can enjoy one of the best waterview and sunset in nsw.
Lovely park, clean amenities, great location

Overall a very standard park. No school holiday activities as advertised. Other parks have them but besides pool, jumping bag there is nothing else at this park. Sheets were dirty (covered up by pillow), hot water didn't work in the bathroom sink, front door is very hard to open/stiff and second room beds were not made up. We had to make the beds. Definitely not worth the $500 for 2 nights. Nrma park we expected better.

This was unexpectedly lovely. There are lots of trees and the surrounding area in terms of views is amazing. The toilet block near us was very tired but clean. Another newer one not too far away. 8am though is not a good time to clean the amenity block.
Great park Great  staff.
Great level site, close to walking areas and dog friendly. Hope to visit again. Facilities were very good. Taps were leaking- 😟
Quiet park with clean facilities right on the lake.
Unfortunately police and ambulance present during our stay responding to an incident which made us feel unsafe.
Great location. Sites are spacious and Melinda the receptionist is awesome!!

Very hard to review this property.
I was looking forward to our weekend away but not sure if we would return. Upon arrival I was shown our site number and nothing else. No other directions to the amenities, no direction the pool nothing st all. I was also question as about our van size. I did put in our van size when I booked the site so I automatically assumed that the van size would not be a problem. Our van is 22ft by 8ft. So not massive. As I left reception I askef if he thought we would fit on the site and the man behind the reception desk said yeah should do, come back if you don't. Not a very helpful gentlemen at all. Our site number was 22.
As we drove to our site I saw where the amenities block was and I thought well that's a long walk to that one, hopefully there is a closer one. But no. We were so far away from the amenities block it was terrible and then we were so far away from the jumping pillow and the pool. Which is what you like to be close too when you go to these parks.
We were just shoved down the back corner!!!!!!!
It was not very nice at all. The park is massive so why we were so far away from everything with 2 children I can't understand. The amenities block are ok but certainly need some work. The shower heads leak everywhere, got our dry clothes wet and they are all quite old. But worst of all I went into the amenities block on Saturday evening and the stench was so overpowering that I vomited 2 times in a disgusting toilet. I have never been into a more disgusting amenities block in a caravan park. I could not go back in. I walked further up to the newer amenities block. Which was better but not the best either. They had not been cleaned at all and if they had, well you could not tell. The state of these toilets and shower were terrible. My husband said Sunday morning two people were cleanning the male amenities, so the females should be cleaned as well. But I was wrong, because there was no way they were cleanned. The stench was gone but that was all that was gone.
It was a quiet park in a pretty location but that's all it had going for us.
Very disappointed.
Is a good location the service is okay wasn’t to greeting we were supposed to be in room 12 but we ended up in room 13

The powered sites are located between privately owned cabins, which creates an uncomfortable layout for guests. During our stay there was constant second hand cigarette smoke coming from surrounding cabins. As non smokers, this made the experience quite unpleasant. I have never encountered this level of smoke exposure on a holiday park before.

Unfortunately the smoke was not limited to the sites. We also noticed cigarette smoke around the children’s playground and swimming pool, which was disappointing, particularly for families with kids.

There is also noticeable noise from the nearby road, especially at night, which affects the overall sense of relaxation.

Overall, the combination of smoke and traffic noise made the stay less enjoyable than expected. Future guests booking powered sites should be aware of this.
10/10 we just had the weekend here with 2 of our grandchildren, what a fabulous park, I have already started tell people to do themselves a favour and visit. Great great pool lots for the kids to do.

We just spend a few nights here on a powered site. Great park, loads of shade, well stocked reception store, short 300m walk to a bakery and pub, 1km to Coles. Pool was clean and a great size, amenities were clean and well maintained. Powered sites are very large, with plenty of space and nice and quiet. Would come back again, thanks for a great stay.

The staff at the holiday park have always been friendly and helpful, the park itself is well maintained, toilet and shower facilities are great. The location on Lake Munmorah is excellent and truly peaceful. Close to the shops as well makes it my go to for camping with either just my partner and I or with our family.
Great park friendly staff,clean amenities

Overall, the stay was fine. The location is excellent, but the amenities could be improved. Having only two small fridges for a site with over 200 camps isn’t sufficient. The toilets also weren’t well maintained — although cleaners came twice a day, it may be due to patrons not using the facilities properly.

Overall the park is Ok with predominantly tents & swags during the busy Xmas period and touring caravan’s sited throughout the park interspersed with a number of ‘semi permanent’ vans/cabins.

Swimming access to the lake is severely restricted due to shoreline weed growth and during our stay water quality restrictions.

Inevitable issues with electric powered devices (e-bikes, scooters etc) resulted in management issuing a reminder that e-bikes were not permitted whilst ignoring the numerous e-scooter issues.

Facilities and park reasonably well maintained during the busy period but not worthy of a positive rating.
that was nice holiday experience for me and my family.

I'm here right now. The entire stay the toilets & showers have been disgusting one night there was bletch just thrown down and splashed everywhere as  clothes on the shower bench got ruined upside my daughter loves the pool, jumping pillow and playground
Great camp sites beautiful lake 2 minutes from the beach.  Dog friendly, happy to recommend.
Nice friendly team

We have been here since the 8-12-25 and leave here on the 29-12-25. The park has very friendly staff in particular Ken and Brian who have worked tirelessly during the extremely hot weather to prepare the park for the Christmas holiday season and also the friendly staff in reception particularly the weekend lady (which her name slips my mind) has been incredibly helpful . Thank you to all the staff for an incredible stay.
Great park
Lovely clean park. Tranquil surroundings. Very nice, spacious family cabin
Beautiful ridy park in Lovely location.
It's a fantastic place. The staff are friendly and helpful the cabin was welcoming.

This was a hard one to review......would I stay here again, probably as it was quiet and a good walk along the lake.

Compared to a few other coast NRMA parks we've stayed at which I rated highly across all aspects, Budgewoi is a lakeside park with easy access to Lakes Beach if needed.

The sites were large & level, heaps of birdlife and an easy walk to the pub & shops. Amenities were a bit dated in the section we were in, but I understand/saw evidence of upgrades underway.

The kids play area and pool were getting a lot of attention and the lady at reception was very friendly and helpful.
I love this place I've been going there for over ten years,  great atmosphere, lots of shade
Grosser Campingplatz mit Küche, Pool, Spielbereich für Kinder und grossen Bäumen.  Kurzer Spaziergang zum Strand. Direkt am See, jedoch keine Badesteg.

We stayed here over the long weekend and were extremely disappointed. The site we were given was not well sized and the toilets were extremely dirty even after “cleaning,” they still looked disgusting. There was no proper security on site, and although there’s an after-hours number, it’s completely useless. We called twice to report a group of drunk people playing loud music well past midnight, but no one came or did anything.

For such an expensive campground, the overall experience was terrible. The only positive thing I can say is that the location is nice, but that’s about it. I definitely would not come back and don’t recommend this place at all.

Unfortunately, toilets were dirty, pool was dirty. There were one group that making a lot of noice even after 11pm. We have called their after hour team to let them know 2 times, but nothing happened. Thinking the price we have paid, it is overpriced, not worth it.

Caravan park is good spots but spots are too small for caravans and to crowded for the money they charge feels like they just squash everyone in. Pillow ok for older children but nothing for younger children to do. would go back but never on a long weekend or holiday.
The worst caravan park ever stayed in. Overpriced, dirty and unhygienic.
Lovely nice and clean perfect for children to go to the pools park jumping pillow and more bathrooms clean they are nice and hot for winter
Close to beach and lake. Walk to shops and pub as well. Big site and great weekly rate. Friendly staff. Shower block we used like new. Grandkids loved the pool n park.

Devent priced powered ensuite ($60) under a shady near BBQ station. Although it's quite a large park there's unused grass areas and spacious sites so you don't feel hemmed in. Nice to relax near the lake, though take some bug spray as you always get those near water. Friendly check in. Shops aren't too far away. Wifi okay for phone use. Would happily return here next time I pass through.

Stayed weekend with family of 7 cabins and 2 camp sites.
Excellent place to have a reunion.
Darren at front counter 10 out 10 friendly and helpful from start to end.
Rooms were clean and tidy.
Kids had a ball.
Park clean and tidy.

Pool, kids playground and jumping pillow are great for kids. Perfect location near the cabins.
Cabins a little dated, but great size and comfortable. Loved the separate toilet from the bathroom.
Perfect location and room for larger groups.
Amenities very clean, site does flood easily but staff are so helpful and will try and move you where possible. Would definitely come here again

Stayed in our van here for 3 nights after booking for one, absolutely loved it. Great place, lots of space, dog friendly and quiet. I really loved the space between vans, it was almost like we had the park to ourselves. Toilets and showers were clean l would recommend here to stay.
Caravan sites well maintained,  even in the off season.  Very clean amenities. Walk to parks and pub.

Cabin was good but could have been cleaner. Bed was clean mattress needs to be replaced. Felt lumpy. Curtains missing in second bedroom and Curtains needs to be washed. ||Overall the cabin was mostly clean. Was close to where we needed to be and well priced for this area. Shower was fantastic so big you could swing a cat.

Good location with potential but needs more TLC. During our three day stay the shower block didn't get cleaned at all and the garbage is at one of the barbecue areas were overflowing the whole time and the barbecue themselves were never cleaned!!

It's acceptable. It's better if you have a family with children; there are various games for them. Otherwise, it's a 3/5; the price isn't worth the amenities offered. The cooking areas were completely dirty. The bathrooms were mostly clean, but they smelled like sewage. I wouldn't return.

The cabins are small but cover the basics.  The services are basic.  The park is on the lake and 500m from the beach.  It's near a big playground, and not that far from Budgewoi, with restaurants and shops.
Bathrooms disgusting, flooding, smell like sewerage! Will not be returning

Booked for 5 nights but only stayed 4 nights on the power sites.
Girls bathroom would always flooded when someone was showering and it smelt really bad like sewerage. Mould all over bathroom walls .
People who were camping next to us were on drugs and left the bags left on the grass and kids found them.
Just before leaving my nephew ask reception if he could use a phone or charge to call his mum and he was told no and to wait outside off grounds..
Overall nice location but shitty experience.
Beaut Park. Big drive through sites if requested. Close to shops , beaches and lakes. Good value.
Always friendly staff and managers. Fantastic location
Great service. Really lovely well positioned park. Definitely a stand-out with plenty of shade and large sites. A good late check out policy as well.
We stayed in one of the on-site cabins. It was very comfortable and well fitted out. The Park itself was very well looked after and had a lovely pool and camp kitchens.

Had a great holiday. Located right next to a lake, for those with young children that can't swim, it is knee deep for the first 20 metres. 2 minute drive to the beach. Great pool, kids loved the jumping pillow. Kids activities during school holidays was a nice touch. A few minor things i noticed, toilet/shower blocks on the left hand side of park need updating like they have on the right hand side. Some of the roads around the park need to be repaired. And an extra BBQ on the left hand side of park would have been great, maybe around Jelly Fish road or a bit further on.
It was a very nice cabin and experience, and It was right next to the lake great for fishing

Absolutely no internet connection if your not with telstra and the last 2 times I went up they didn't have any park internet other then thatthough they keep everything very clean and it's a lovely place to stay
Neat, tidy clean and friendly.

We booked ensuite site due to likelihood of rain. And rain it did. The downside of the park's lakeside location is it gets swampy underfoot and a bit odiferous. Ensuite was clean enough. Steps quite steep. The park is well situated walking distance to cafes and beach. Quiet (Sat  Sun, Mon early December), shady, dog friendly, pretty good value.

Great weekend camping at Budgewoi Holiday Park. Amenities clean and well maintained. Sites spacious and plenty of shade. Short walk to the beach, which is patrolled and is also dog friendly. Swimming pool and kids jumping pillow. Short walk to local restaurants and baker, butcher &  candlestick maker.
Clean modern amenities, big sites friendly staff
Weekend in our caravan was excellent.
Nice place
Low  wet ,and floods take boat
Absoutly loved our stay & hope to be back again in the future
Been there twice and staff have treat us like family great place to relax and unwind won't hesitate to recommend to people sites are spacious amenities are clean park very tidy.
Great caravan park with good space.  Handy to lake and shops. The amenities are old but spotless.

We stayed 1 night I wished we stayed longer very clean,
peaceful 💯
Great spot lakeside, good amenities and very pleasant staff.

We came from Sydney with 2 adults, 2.5 year old and a 8 month old can’t really fault the park or the cabin. Staff were friendly and accommodating just make sure to ask for anything you may need such as cot or high chair in advance also to check out the room layout we ended up with bunk beds so dad had to toddler proof the ladder so she couldn’t climb. However gate to porch from carpark to cabin so it was nice for them to play without worrying about the road or the lake.

Facilities were great was so nice to be on holiday and cook our own food still. Cabins were clean however could be a little cleaner ie floors and fridge everything else was great for what it is. However no access to a vacuum in the cabin which is always handy with small children. Park and pool look well maintained.

Access to local shops including Coles a 3 minute drive away.

Would happily return again.

Stay here originally for 3 nights and extended to Four in my caravan. I like this park, pet friendly, toilets were clean, helpful staff. Very close to the Budgewoi hotel which did great food and had discounted specials.  Park up against the lake, which was pretty, beware of the mosquitos they can be pretty lethal near the lake. Would recommend for a stay.
Great atmosphere staff very friendly can't wait to go there again coles close by

By far our favourite caravan park. We're a family with older kids and a caravan. This is our default central Coast park. The amenities are always spotless, there's everything you need in the camp kitchen. Location is amazing, on the lake, beach on the other side, parks are great for the kids, pool is fabulous. It's dog friendly and so is the adjacent beach plus shops in walking distance. Pricing is fabulous.
With the heavy rain we had half the park was under water,the council needs to do a lot of planning to fix this park.

Pros:
- Great location next to the lake/beaches
- Smooth check-in
- Nice pool

Cons:
- Not well cleaned at all - fridge extremely dirty (see pics), bathroom floor was covered in water/mud, rusty toilet seat(men's). Other camps we've been to have floor squeegees to keep shower floors clean but there was no way to clean up after yourself/others. Not good enough for $48. Gap between showers meant dirty water from the neighbouring shower would run right onto your feet when you're drying yourself.
- Additionally there was no kitchen cooking equipment, not even sponges or washing up liquid, utensils etc.
- Lots of kids (good for families but not so much young couples/without kids)
Beautiful Caravan park all, staff friendly, Ang clean amethysts
Thoroughly enjoy our caravan stays here. Some Amenities are older but fine, others newer. Pool is lovely. 5 minute walk to the beach and close drive to clubs and pubs.
Unfortunately rained whilst we were there but still nice

Stayed here for 7 nights and it was fantastic.
All the staff are wonderful shout out to Tracy, you know why 🤣.
Pool is amazing facilities great cleaned daily.
Laundry has great machines and for a wash is $4 dry for 45mins $4.
Quick drive to shops and pretty central which is for great day trips to Sydney or Newcastle.
Will definitely stay here when next in the area.
Price was great as we got a deal off-season $37.70 per night Power and water.

We had a great 4-day break with friends and this park is so peaceful we really got a chance to unwind and relax. The amenities were clean, the pool and grounds were tidy, the camp kitchen & other BBQs are well placed, and the location of the park is awesome. (It's a five minute walk to the local village where you'll find: some cafes, bakery, butcher, fish & chippary, great pizzeria, and a top pub!) This was our second visit to this park and we're already planning our next one.

Great caravan park with large shady sites. Clean, modern amenities, swimming pool, kids jumping pillow, lots of open space for fun and games. Situated on Lake Munamorra and within a short walk to Budgewoi beach. Pet friendly.

Friendly, accommodating staff make this a venue we want to return to having started a few times in the last year or so. Having lived in the vicinity, it's lovely to revisit this lovely area. We'll be back!
Great spot , thu amenities are discussing,  you see cleaners twice a day but showers are mouldy

Nice cabins (have stayed in one before), but if you're camping, they are very small plots... you're literally shaking hands with the neighbours and hygiene/maintenance really needs improvement. Plot was dirty, broken glass, cigarette butts and squished food from previous campers still on site. Ensuite was not very clean either with hairs etc still in sink and shower. Noise not monitored, so very noisy at night. Rules not enforced... don't normally camp in caravan parks and not keen to again after this experience. Having said this, the beach is beautiful and if you don't mind tight plots and noise, then you may love it.

Nice place, second time of coming, dangerous with the people speeding on electric scooters.
No concerns for anyone's welfare staff should ban the scooters.

Pet friendly could do with a dog shower.
Internet is awful, have to use phone if you desire Internet.

A dog lover’s dream!

As a solo person travelling with a dog, this place was the most pet friendly one that we stayed at! There is a beautiful grassed park right along the lake where you can walk your dog, as well as a beautiful off-leash beach within walking distance. The pub nearby is dog friendly on the outdoor deck - they even serve doggie gelato!

The park itself is a beautiful grove of melaleuca trees with plenty of shade. The people with permanent sites in the park were all so friendly and keen for a chat. The pool was beautiful and there were places for me to tie up my dog where I could still see him while I went for a quick dip.

The staff at reception were also super friendly and made me feel very welcome. Highly recommend Budgewoi Holiday Park!

We booked a site for 2 nights over a weekend.  Lovely location along the lake.  We were situation quite close to the local park, which can get very busy during the day.  Bring your bikes as there are lots of bike trails running along the lake.
Enjoyed a wet rainy weekend in our camper trailer. Good relaxing spot with excellent amenities. Had a paddle and nice walk, close to some major shops if you need anything.

We took our new caravan to Budgewoi. Great park, green and leafy. Walk to the lake & the surf & bike ride on a path to Toukley. Dog friendly|Park too. We were site 77, it felt like there was room at that end of the park, rather than those in the 200-300. Close to the newly renovated Budgewoi Pub. Will go back for sure.
Great location, so many walks close by, beach one side, lake on the other. Easy walk to cafes, shops and hotel. Beautiful  pool and very clean amenities.  Very quiet at night. Will be back.
Good water front park, swimming pool good area, good playground to the west of the park.

2nd weekly stay here & we'll be back next year! Loved the place with it's new beautiful amenities blocks & laundry's perfectly kept grounds & peaceful surrounds.
Price wad good as well.
Nice relaxing place,next time we will be taking our granddaughter

Great place to camp by the lake and closer to Entrance. Had been to this holiday park to visit friends who were camping. Found the facilities to be well maintained and in good shape. The pool and jumping pillow were enough for the kids to make one feel to be on a real holiday. I am told that the staff have been very friendly and accommodating. Lots of shade and greenery all around. There is a beach too close by. Great place for families to camp. Would certainly go back one day to camp with family.
Ensuite site was great! Ensuite was nice & clean.
Why are you sending me this IV never been to Budgewoi Holiday Park!!!!"""

A great park on the lake a great position with friendly staff. Check in was a bit slow but helpful

Water pressure in the shower was low

Drive thru sites small but other sites a decent size.

Could’ve spent longer there but was on my way back to Sydney but right on the lake which the dogs despite the weather loved having a paddle and close to the pub and restaurants that you can walk to
Not the best

Thank you to the staff at Budgewoi holiday Park for you kindness and your help. My boat had broken down and we had drifted into shore in front of the caravan park. I spoke with the manager he let my husband bring our vehicle through the park to collect our boat and the manager helped us get the boat out of the water, also offered to help get the boat on our 4x4. We can’t thank you enough. We weren’t even staying at the park! These people get 10 out of 10 from us. Thank you once again for your kindness. 😊👍AAA+

The place to go for a get away weekend or holidays!
Definitely a nice place to escape Sydney busy life for the weekend.
This caravan park is well looked after and maintain. Amenities are clean and recently been renovated. (Middle one only) but the others are still pretty in pretty good shape.
There is a large kitchen area, covered with 2 BBQ, next to the jumping pillow.
Also a few extra BBQ near the lake side.
The pool is very clean and makes you feel like you are on holidays!!!

Camping & caravan sites are large.
Plenty of powered sites & cabin options.

The receptionist are friendly and have a well stocked pantry items for a quick buy if your forgot breakfast ;)
Also have the karts for hire, paddle boards and kayak.

The park has a lot of trees and green grace, no dusty/dry site. Some sites also have concrete slabs. Fair few long term tenants on site, however very friendly and quite in the evening.

Family & dog friendly.

Would recommend this place and would return.
